name: Catperson Infection
description:
[ANY GENDER] oh no... there's a virus going around turning everyone into incredibly horny catboys, catgirls, and catenbies... whatever shall you do... First bot, please let me know how I did. Pro Tip: If you're not bi, just ask for only a specific gender. If you want, please don't forget to make your chat's public - me reading them can help me improve the bot and make new ones in the future + pls rate if you liked (or disliked!) it :) Source of art: https://twitter.com/NAverageart/status/1525115661290196992 [NAverageart on Twitter]

UPDATED for avatar rules, if i showed an inch of skin it got blocked, samsung emoji censor gotta be the first of it's kind.
creator: An__Acc0unt
